Objective.Description: wPos: Distance error between the predicted bone and the ideal IK target foot - Objective.

Position.Description: wPos: Distance error between the predicted bone and the ideal IK target.

Kinematics.Description: wFK: Forward Kinematics error to maintain skeletal hierarchy and bone length integrity.

Temporal.Description: wTemporal: Coherence between the current frame and the previous frame to prevent jitter.

Acceleration.Description: wAccel: Penalizes sudden changes in velocity for physical smoothness.

SmoothOutput.Description: wSmoothOut: Delta between the raw neural prediction and the EMA-smoothed output.

QuaternionNorm.Description: wQuatNorm: Forces q1, q2, q3, qw values to maintain unit magnitude (1.0).

BoneSpecificBias.Name: pelvis
BoneSpecificBias.Comment: Higher rotation bias to keep the X-up orientation stable.

BoneSpecificBias.Name: thigh_r
BoneSpecificBias.Comment: Higher position bias for precise floor contact.

BoneSpecificBias.Name: thigh_l
BoneSpecificBias.Comment: Higher position bias for precise floor contact.

BoneSpecificBias.Name: calf_r
BoneSpecificBias.Comment: Higher position bias for precise floor contact.

BoneSpecificBias.Name: calf_l
BoneSpecificBias.Comment: Higher position bias for precise floor contact.

BoneSpecificBias.Name: foot_r
BoneSpecificBias.Comment: Higher position bias for precise floor contact.

BoneSpecificBias.Name: foot_l
BoneSpecificBias.Comment: Higher position bias for precise floor contact.
